evidence.claim: Atomicity ensures that if any part of the withdrawal fails, the entire operation is rolled back.
evidence.fact: The entire withdrawal sequence is executed as a single indivisible unit, ensuring that if anything goes wrong all changes are reversed immediately.
evidence.user_story_span: Atomicity ensures that if any part of the withdrawal fails, the entire operation is rolled back.
evidence.fact_span: The entire withdrawal sequence is executed as a single indivisible unit, ensuring that if anything goes wrong all changes are reversed immediately.

evidence.claim: The user's account balance should never be left in an inconsistent state.
evidence.fact: A user's money is never lost or duplicated due to partial failures, because the system reverts every alteration when an error occurs.
evidence.user_story_span: The user's account balance should never be left in an inconsistent state.
evidence.fact_span: A user's money is never lost or duplicated due to partial failures, because the system reverts every alteration when an error occurs.
